transcript: Speaker A: 2025 aipodaniki inka konni rojule unnay. Naa oka secret app tho meeru 2026 rakamunde English matladedhi nechuko. English matladedhi easy, kani memu real life lo practice cheyyamu. Konni sarlu manaki siggu untundi, lekapothe bhayam untundi, edo wrong English matladatam em mohan. daaniki okate solution SpeakX app! Akkada manaki smart AI teacher doruktaru. Ee teacher real time lo mana mistakes cheptundi, correct cheyadam lo help chestundi. English lo matladedhi easy chestundi. Mari aa AI teacher eppudu neetho English lo matladutundi. Nuvvu intlo unna, train lo unna, office lo unna, ekkadunna parvaledu! AI teacher tho siggu ledhu, hesitation ledhu. SpeakX lo AI teacher eppudu rediga untaru. Mari ippude SpeakX app download cheyyandi! [Only a few days are left for 2025 to end. With my secret app, learn to speak English before 2026 arrives. Speaking English is easy, but we don't practice in real life. Sometimes we feel shy or afraid of speaking wrong English. The only solution is the SpeakX app! There we get a smart AI teacher who corrects mistakes in real-time and helps us improve. It makes speaking English easy. This AI teacher is always ready to talk to you, whether you are at home, on a train, or in the office. No shyness, no hesitation. Download the SpeakX app now!]
on_screen_text: 2025, aipodanki, secret app, 2026, nechuko, real life lo, siggu untundi, bhayam untundi, wrong English, daaniki okate solution, SpeakX app!, smart AI teacher, doruktaru, real time lo, correct, easy chestundi, AI teacher, English lo, intlo unna, train lo unna, office lo unna, parledhu!, siggu ledhu, hesitation ledhu, eppudu rediga, SpeakX app, download chayandi! [2025, ending, secret app, 2026, learn, in real life, feeling shy, feeling afraid, wrong English, only one solution, SpeakX app!, smart AI teacher, available, in real-time, correct, makes it easy, AI teacher, in English, at home, on train, in office, doesn't matter!, no shyness, no hesitation, always ready, SpeakX app, download now!]
summary: The presenter encourages viewers to learn English before 2026 using the SpeakX app. He explains how the app's AI teacher helps overcome shyness and fear by correcting mistakes in real-time. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the SpeakX app.
